nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as requiring excessive oversight and correction
nodes.grounding_span: I'm finding I'm using it more and more to save time and to get more work done

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: make it sound less 'AI'... it can use a very AI voice which is hard to break out of

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I never let it handle stuff independently as I don't feel it is quite there yet and still needs a lot of oversight

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it did often struggle to remember all the instructions at one time so often needed reminding

nodes.label: AI capability in image editing
nodes.label_negative: AI poor performance in image editing
nodes.grounding_span: I've tried to use it to edit images for me... but so far it's always done a really poor job

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: save time and to get more work done

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: make it sound less 'AI'... maintain readability while preserving academic nuance

nodes.label: Control and reliability in work outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: I never let it handle stuff independently as I don't feel it is quite there yet

nodes.label: Professional competence and future-proofing
nodes.grounding_span: I am trying to make sure I am skilled at working with AI so that we can collaborate in future

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for wording tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I can save time this way

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to maintain context
nodes.grounding_span: it kept giving me comments on the initial draft rather than the pdf I'd just shared

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think as AI gets better and doesn't need to be corrected and checked so much, I may let it do a little more for me

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation
nodes.grounding_span: so far it's always done a really poor job

nodes.label: Iterative task expansion — gradually increasing AI's role
nodes.grounding_span: I started off quite simply... but then gradually got it to do more with the actual content itself

nodes.label: Human-first writing approach — prefers to write drafts manually before AI polish
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do the bulk of the writing myself and then perhaps use an AI for its advice or to help polish
